arts.ttl: Blow for Lazio as Hellas Verona Raise Their Price for Young Revelation
arts.sum: Lazio have reportedly tabled a bid for Reda Belahyane but it fell short of the new price tag set by Hellas Verona. New Owners at Verona The two clubs will lock horns at the Bentegodi Stadium on Sunday, but they have been embroiled in negotiations for the 20-year-old midfielder for quite some time. The two […] The post Blow for Lazio as Hellas Verona Raise Their Price for Young Revelation appeared first on The Laziali.
